title: hooks: Add package support for extension stages
body: We aren't consuming this yet, but these pkg/hooks changes lay the groundwork for future libpod changes to support post-exit hooks (#730, opencontainers/runc#1797, kubernetes-incubator/cri-o#1366).

comments.body: Pushed a fix for the gofmt errors.

One Nit.
What are extension stages and how are they intended t o be used?

> What are extension stages and how are they intended t o be used?

The initial PR comment here is pretty brief, but I went into a bit more detail [here][1].  There's also more discussion on `#podman` yesterday afternoon (are there public logs for that channel?).  Let me know if you need more detail beyond that.

[1]: https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/issues/730#issuecomment-388474559
